scripts.build:native: mkdir -p src/native && (SWIFT_MODULECACHE_PATH=/tmp/claude-swift-module-cache CLANG_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=/tmp/claude-clang-module-cache /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/swiftc -sdk /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -o src/native/transcribe-file src/native/transcribe-file.swift -framework Speech || SWIFT_MODULECACHE_PATH=/tmp/claude-swift-module-cache CLANG_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=/tmp/claude-clang-module-cache xcrun swiftc -o src/native/transcribe-file src/native/transcribe-file.swift -framework Speech) 2>&1 || echo 'Swift compilation failed - dictation will be unavailable'
scripts.copy:native: mkdir -p out/native && cp -f src/native/transcribe-file out/native/transcribe-file 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.build: npm run build:native && electron-vite build && npm run copy:native
